---
title: "AI in Public Health Workshop"
image: "ai_teaching.jpeg"
description: "Teaching Assistant"
format:
  html:
    includes:
      in_header: style.css
      before_body: cover.html
---
<script type="text/javascript">
document.write(`
<!-- Background Image with Gradient Overlay and Slideshow -->
<div id="intro-section" style="position: relative; text-align: center; color: white;">

  <!-- Slideshow Background -->
  <div class="slideshow-container">
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/AI_in_Public_Health/ai_in_public_health_1.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/AI_in_Public_Health/ai_in_public_health_2.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/AI_in_Public_Health/ai_in_public_health_3.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/AI_in_Public_Health/ai_in_public_health_4.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/AI_in_Public_Health/ai_in_public_health_5.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/AI_in_Public_Health/ai_in_public_health_6.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/AI_in_Public_Health/ai_in_public_health_7.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/teaching/AI_in_Public_Health/ai_in_public_health_8.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Text Overlay on the Background Image -->
  <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 40px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); text-align: center; width: 100%;">
    <h1 style="font-size: 3em; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;">AI in Public Health Workshop</h1>
    <p style="font-size: 1.5em; text-align: center; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">This four-day workshop will provide participants with a practical understanding of how Artificial Intelligence (AI) can be applied to enhance public health activities. Through hands-on activities, case studies, and discussions, participants will learn how to use AI tools to improve disease surveillance, diagnosis, treatment, and overall healthcare delivery. The workshop will run from [dates here].</p>
  </div>
</div>

  <!-- Structured Program Details Below the Image -->
  <div id="program-details" style="padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9;">
    <h2 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Program Outline & Learning Objectives</h2>
    <p style="text-align: justify; margin: 0 20px;">
      Participants will <strong>understand</strong> the basic terminology and concepts of AI. They will also <strong>evaluate</strong> the potential benefits and challenges of implementing AI in public health, while <strong>analyzing</strong> real-world case studies of AI applications in disease surveillance. Additionally, they will <strong>use</strong> AI tools such as ChatGPT and BARD to speed up public health data analysis. Finally, participants will <strong>assess</strong> the ethical, legal, and societal implications of AI integration in public health.
    </p>



  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Format and Activities</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li>Interactive lectures and presentations</li>
    <li>Hands-on exercises and practical demonstrations</li>
    <li>Group discussions and case studies</li>
    <li>Guest speakers from the field of AI and public health</li>
    <li>Take-home assignments</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Instructors</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li>Yogesh Hooda, PhD (Scientist & Lead of Biochemistry, CHRF)</li>
    <li>Senjuti Saha, PhD (Director & Senior Scientist, CHRF)</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Guest Speakers</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li>Sudipta Saha (PhD Candidate, Harvard University, USA)</li>
    <li>Mark Sun, PhD (Principal Research Scientist, Versant Stealth Startup, Canada)</li>
  </ul>


  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Schedule</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding-left: 0;">
    <li>Day 1: Introduction to AI (AI concepts, terminology, applications, and hands-on generating AI code)</li>
    <li>Day 2: AI Applications in Public Health Modeling (Typhoid incidence calculation in Bangladesh, modeling vaccine impact)</li>
    <li>Day 3: AI in Disease Surveillance (Data sources, data quality, outbreak detection using AI)</li>
    <li>Day 4: Implementing AI in Public Health and Future Trends (AI in medical image analysis, addressing bias, ethical discussions)</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Duration & Location</h3>
  <p style="text-align: center;">Duration: 4 days <br> Location: CHRF-HQ, Shyamoli, Dhaka, Bangladesh</p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Supported By</h3>
  <img src="../../files/img//training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_scRNA_Sequencing_and_Analysis/bill_foundation.png" lt="MBill " style="max-width: 200px; margin: 10px;">
  <p style="text-align: center;">This workshop is part of the “Democratizing Public Health Modeling Using AI-based Tools” grant by the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation. </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Apply Now</h3>
  <p style="text-align: center;">
    <a href="https://chrfbd.org/blogs/4f86dc07-664d-4182-a349-218b0c4249e5" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill me-2">Program Website</a>
  </p>
</div>
`);
</script>

<!-- Add additional details if required -->
<style>
  #program-details {
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    color: #333;
    line-height: 1.6;
    padding: 20px;
    background-color: #f9f9f9;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    font-size: 1.2em;
  }
  
  h2, h3 {
    margin-top: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-align: center;
  }

  div {
    font-size: 1em;
    margin: 0 auto;
    max-width: 1000px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  p {
    font-size: 1em;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }


  /* Slideshow container */
  .slideshow-container {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Each slide */
  .mySlides {
    position: absolute;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 1.5s ease-in-out;
  }

  .mySlides:first-child {
    opacity: 1;
  }
</style>

<script>
  let slideIndex = 0;
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.mySlides');
  
  function showSlides() {
    slides.forEach((slide) => {
      slide.style.opacity = '0';  // Hide all slides
    });
    slideIndex++;
    if (slideIndex > slides.length) { slideIndex = 1; }  // Loop back to first slide
    slides[slideIndex - 1].style.opacity = '1';  // Show the current slide
    setTimeout(showSlides, 3000);  // Change image every 3 seconds
  }

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    showSlides();  // Initialize the slideshow
  });
</script>
